data.title: Elon Musk, White House Deny Reports Of Tesla CEO's Early Exit From Trump Team
data.description: Tesla Inc. CEO (NASDAQ: TSLA) Elon Musk has denied rumors of his premature departure from the Trump administration. This comes despite his recent unpopularity influencing a state supreme court race.

data.title: Mozilla's Thunderbird Evolves With Thundermail And Pro Features To Compete With Gmail, Microsoft 365 In The Email Wars
data.description: Mozilla is revamping its Thunderbird email client with the launch of Thundermail and Thunderbird Pro, introducing new privacy-focused features to compete with Gmail and Microsoft 365.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Lower Following Trump's Tariffs: 'Worse Than The Worst Case Scenario,' Says Analyst
data.description: U.S. stock futures plummeted on Thursday after advancing on Wednesday. Futures of benchmark indices were down over 2% in premarket trading.

data.title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink Urges Investors To Move Over 60/40 Model To 50/30/20 Strategy: '...May No Longer Fully Represent True Diversification'
data.description: Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock Inc. (NYSE: BLK), has proposed a novel investment strategy that could potentially reshape the traditional 60/40 portfolio.

data.title: Trump Tariffs Could Cost $30 Trillion Or About $300,000 Per Family, Says Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers: 'Most Expensive And Masochistic'
data.description: Larry Summers explains that the tariffs imposed by Donald Trump could cost $30 trillion or $300,000 per family of four in the US economy.
